parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
box "VideoSink"
participant SurfaceViewRenderer
participant ProxyVideoSink
participant VideoSinkWrapper
end box

box "VideoDecoder"
participant VideoBroadcaster
participant webrtcVideoReceiveStream
participant IncomingVideoStream
participant VideoStreamDecoder
participant VCMDecodedFrameCallback
participant VideoDecoderCallback
participant AndroidVideoDecoder
participant VideoDecoderWrapper
participant VideoDecoderSoftwareFallbackWrapper
participant VCMGenericDecoder
end box

box "VideoReceiver"
participant VideoReceiver2
participant VideoReceiveStream
participant FrameBuffer
end box

box "RTPReceiver"
participant RtpVideoStreamReceiver
participant RtpStreamReceiverController
participant RtpDemuxer
end box

box "Transceiver"
participant webrtcCall
participant internalCall
participant Transport
participant MediaChannel
participant WebRtcVideoChannel
participant NetworkInterface
participant BaseChannel
participant VideoChannel
participant RtpTransportInternal
participant RtpTransport
participant SrtpTransport
participant DtlsSrtpTransport
end box

box "DTLS"
participant webrtcDtlsTransport
participant PacketTransportInternal
participant P2PTransportChannel
participant ProxyConnection
participant UDPPort
participant SignalReadEvent
participant AsyncUDPSocket
participant PhysicalSocket
end box

== Receive RTP ==

AsyncUDPSocket -> PhysicalSocket : OnReadEvent()
activate PhysicalSocket
PhysicalSocket -> PhysicalSocket : RecvFrom()
PhysicalSocket -> AsyncUDPSocket : recvfrom()
deactivate PhysicalSocket

AsyncUDPSocket -> SignalReadEvent : OnReadEvent()
SignalReadEvent -> UDPPort : HandleIncomingPacket()
UDPPort -> ProxyConnection : OnReadPacket()
ProxyConnection -> P2PTransportChannel : OnReadPacket()
P2PTransportChannel -> PacketTransportInternal : OnReadPacket()
PacketTransportInternal -> webrtcDtlsTransport : OnReadPacket()
webrtcDtlsTransport -> RtpTransportInternal : OnReadPacket()
RtpTransportInternal -> RtpTransport : OnReadPacket()
RtpTransport -> SrtpTransport : OnRtpPacketReceived()
SrtpTransport -> DtlsSrtpTransport : OnRtpPacketReceived()
DtlsSrtpTransport -> RtpDemuxer : OnRtpPacket()

== Receive Video ==

RtpDemuxer -> NetworkInterface : OnRtpPacket()
NetworkInterface -> BaseChannel : OnPacketReceived()
BaseChannel -> VideoChannel : OnPacketReceived()
VideoChannel -> Transport : OnPacketReceived()
Transport -> MediaChannel : OnPacketReceived()
MediaChannel -> WebRtcVideoChannel : OnPacketReceived()
WebRtcVideoChannel -> webrtcCall : DeliverPacket()
webrtcCall -> internalCall : DeliverPacket()
internalCall -> RtpStreamReceiverController : OnRtpPacket()
RtpStreamReceiverController -> RtpVideoStreamReceiver : OnRtpPacket()
RtpVideoStreamReceiver -> RtpVideoStreamReceiver : ReceivePacket()
RtpVideoStreamReceiver -> RtpVideoStreamReceiver : OnReceivedPayloadData()
RtpVideoStreamReceiver -> RtpVideoStreamReceiver : OnAssembledFrame()
RtpVideoStreamReceiver -> VideoReceiveStream : OnInsertedPacket()
VideoReceiveStream -> FrameBuffer : InsertFrame()
FrameBuffer -> VideoReceiveStream : OnCompleteFrame()

== RESUME ==

VideoReceiveStream -> VideoReceiver2 : HandleEncodedFrame()
VideoReceiver2 -> VCMGenericDecoder : Decode()
VCMGenericDecoder -> VideoDecoderSoftwareFallbackWrapper : Decode()
VideoDecoderSoftwareFallbackWrapper -> VideoDecoderWrapper : Decode()
VideoDecoderWrapper -> AndroidVideoDecoder : Decode()
AndroidVideoDecoder -> VideoDecoderCallback : OnDecodedFrame()
VideoDecoderCallback -> VCMDecodedFrameCallback : Decoded()
VCMDecodedFrameCallback -> VideoStreamDecoder : FrameToRender()
VideoStreamDecoder -> IncomingVideoStream : OnFrame()
IncomingVideoStream -> IncomingVideoStream : Dequeue()
IncomingVideoStream -> webrtcVideoReceiveStream : OnFrame()
webrtcVideoReceiveStream -> VideoBroadcaster : OnFrame()
VideoBroadcaster -> VideoSinkWrapper : OnFrame()
VideoSinkWrapper -> ProxyVideoSink : OnFrame()
ProxyVideoSink -> SurfaceViewRenderer : OnFrame()

@enduml
```
